creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239725
Update GH_ACCOUNT

https://github.com/devttys0/binwalk is now redirected to
https://github.com/ReFirmLabs/binwalk, you might want to update the GH_ACCOUNT variable.

Also, please note that the latest release is 2.3.3, while the port is still at version 2.1.1 (and I have noticed portscout is not helpful here). You might want to update the port.
